log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Astral Elf — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Astral Elf — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Astral Elf — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Astral Elf — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Astral Elf — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Astral Elf — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Astral Elf — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Astral Elf — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Astral Elf — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Astral Elf — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 16 damage. Astral Elf — Armored Tank HP: 43/59
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):9+4=13 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 20] HIT! 20 damage. Astral Elf — Armored Tank HP: 23/59
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):17+4=21 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 35 damage. Astral Elf — Armored Tank HP: -12/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Astral Elf — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.

→ 1/1 targets affected.

REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
